column8: EA IMA ADPCM stereo decoder for TGQ FMV; orig uses g_eaImaStepTableLow/High; port td5_fmv.c is stub (FMVs skipped silently)
FMV audio decoder worker thread (Sleep+InterlockedExchange loop calling WriteAudioToDirectSound); port td5_fmv.c stub does not start any thread
FMV DirectSound stream-buffer writer (IDirectSoundBuffer::Lock/Unlock via vtable +0x2c/+0x4c); port stub has no DSound streaming for FMV
FMV DSound play-cursor query (vtable +0x10 GetCurrentPosition) with software counter fallback (+0x372); port stub absent
FMV _beginthread(AudioDecoderThreadFunc) + SetThreadPriority(0xf); port td5_fmv.c is FMV_STUB, no decoder thread spawn
